review:
Wow! I love pita jungle. We just ordered food from pita jungle through postmates, the delivery came and there were missing items. I called and explained that a few items were missing and the assistant manager, Malik was so sweet and offered to drive the missing food over to our place. He did not have to do that and he insisted. It was extremely kind and I appreciate his positivity when he showed up! 
Not to mention, the chicken Schwarma was so incredible the hummus.... so good. Such a good Arizona favorite and great customer service is always a bonus.
